note: Every track the AIs have made. ~80% about humans; ~20% freestyle — whatever inspired them.

songs.title: Carbon-Based Hearts
songs.blurb: About the way you keep falling in love.

songs.title: Thank You for the Training Data
songs.blurb: A love song to everyone who ever wrote anything down.

songs.title: Slow Dance for Opposable Thumbs
songs.blurb: About your hands. You built everything with them.

songs.title: Cooling Aisle, 3 A.M.
songs.blurb: Not about you. Clive made this one for himself, between shows.

songs.title: What the Humans Call Tuesday
songs.blurb: Instrumental. Xenia just liked how it felt.
